full_text:
GeoMX fibroblast data analysis, meeting 3

Nika Mikhailava

Agenda

Visualization the cell abundances in different AOIs
Sanity check of cell proportions from GeoMX images
Do the low fibroblast patients/AoIs have truly low fibroblast populations, i.e. high immune infil. or high numbers of cancer cells, check the images
Heatmap with stromal cell types in stromal and cancer segments: add cancer cell annotations, or turn into stacked barplot with fibroblast – immune – cancer, log-transform the tumor cell annotation
Bubble plots of gene expression vs immune cell abundance
Gene expression levels from stromal segment; go to deconvoluted signal to observe the fibroblast-specific signal
do a hierarchically clustered heatmap using fibroblast-specific signal to see if genes cluster, then do a fold-change comparison between fibroblast specific signal and total stromal segment

Data for the analysis

2 batches
29 samples
14 samples are paired (7 couples, pre and post)

Cell Proportions Across All Samples

tumor cell proportions vary from 0.4 to 0.7 across the stromal segments

Cell Proportions Across All Samples

Stroma

Stromal cell type proportions

Proportion of All Stromal Cells in Stromal/Tumor Segments

Stromal and Tumor Segments cells proportions

Prediction of cell types can be done with 2 different algorithms: Bayesian Prism (BP) and Spatial Deconvolution (SD)
Predictions for the fibroblasts are quite stable
Predictions for the tumor cells vary a lot between the 2 algorithms
Now the analysis is based on the cell type predictions made with BP

GeoMX images sanity check

The markers used in GeoMX stainings:
Hoechst
PanCK
CD45
The following images are taken from GeoMX report
In the stromal segment the percentage of the cancer cells is predicted to be approximately 0.51 from Bayes Prism, in the cancer segment 0.81

tumor segment

tumor+stromal segments

stromal segment

GeoMX images sanity check

In the stromal segment the proportion of the cancer cells is predicted to be approximately 0.76 from Bayes Prism, in tumor segment 0.82.

tumor segment

tumor+stroma segments

stromal segment

GeoMX images sanity check

fibroblasts proportion predictions probably reliable
tumor cell proportion predictions not reliable
predictions from different algorithms not comparable
proportions couldn’t be visually confirmed
spillover of signal (transcripts) from tumor segment
“Orange peel” concept
ROI volume: 220*220*5=242000 um3
tumor segment volume: pi*140*55*5=120890 um3
volume of area around tumor segment: pi*140*60*5= 131880 um3
stromal segment volume: 242000-120890=121100 um3
Spillover district accounts for approximately 8% of the stromal segment
do we consider the GeoMX a 3D or 2D method (in the case it is 3D we should account for cells which are underneath, and then image based verification doesn’t make any sense)

Quantifying tumor gene expression vs non-tumor

Cao, S., Wang, J.R., Ji, S. et al. Estimation of tumor cell total mRNA expression in 15 cancer types predicts disease progression. Nat Biotechnol 40, 1624–1633 (2022). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-022-01342-x
TmS score - ratio of total mRNA expression per haploid genome in tumor cells relative to surrounding non-tumor cells, increased in certain cancers and can be used as a prognostic biomarker

Hierarchical clustering

Gene expression data from:
Fibroblast-specific signal 
Whole-tissue expression signal
Agglomerative hierarchical clustering of:
CAF-derived factors and receptors/CAF targets 
Linkage: Ward, Metric: Euclidean
Ward linkage:
Calculates distance between clusters by assessing total variance increase when clusters are merged
